div.p: Nagle's Algorithm (RFC 896) Purpose: Reduce small packet count by coalescing writes. Rule: At most one small segment in flight at a time.
MSS = Maximum Segment Size Typically 1460 bytes for Ethernet (1500 MTU - 40 byte headers)
Summary: SEND if ANY condition is TRUE ✓ Full-sized segment (≥ MSS) ✓ No unacknowledged data ✓ PSH flag requested ✓ Nagle disabled (TCP_NODELAY) ✗ Otherwise: Wait for ACK
